caption: A man with long dark hair tied back and glasses stands before a microphone, holding an acoustic guitar. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt paired with a dark blue embroidered vest and a decorative red and white necklace. The setting appears to be an indoor space with a background of horizontal wooden slats. A black microphone on a stand is positioned directly in front of his face. The white text "ORCA" is visible on the right side of the scene. Across the sequence, the man remains in a stationary position, slightly adjusting his head and facial expression as he looks toward the microphone. His hands hold the body of the guitar, though only the upper portion of the instrument is visible. There is very little movement between the frames, capturing a steady, focused moment of a musical performance.
